title: cyperus digitatus var. minor
intro: Cyperus digitatus var. minor, also known as the small or dwarf papyrus sedge, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cyperus digitatus var. minor include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it can also be used in poultices or topical applications to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
